column2: Description
Spy thriller set in the UK (Scheduled release).
Crime thriller about a former baseball player plunged into the NYC criminal underworld.
Drama series starring Jon Hamm as a hedge fund manager who turns to crime.
A series of three films, all set in the Koker region of Iran, that blend fiction and reality. The films are "Where Is the Friend's Home?", "And Life Goes On", and "Through the Olive Trees".
A collection of documentary films and music exploring the 15th-century mystic poet Kabir's philosophy and verses in the contemporary world, through the songs of folk singers.
This refers to the same collection of documentary films and music by Shabnam Virmani exploring the poetry of Kabir in modern India. "Ajab Shehar" means "Strange City."
The life of a woman named Parthenope is traced from her birth in Naples in 1950 to the present day, exploring her long summer of youth, her loves, and the city's own story.
Likely referring to the upcoming film "The Amateur," where a CIA cryptographer blackmails the agency into training him to go after the terrorists who killed his wife.
A biographical drama that follows the final, turbulent days of the legendary opera singer Maria Callas in 1970s Paris as she reflects on her extraordinary life and career.
An ambitious young man from a noble family, unable to serve the king due to his short stature, finds his purpose in the forest, learning its secrets and becoming its protector.

There are several documentaries about Mount Athos. One is titled "People of the Holy Mountain" by Andrei Oprescu, which offers a glimpse into the monastic life on the sacred mountain. Release date and IMDB rating are not readily available.

Information for a film with this exact title by Dimitri Legrand is not readily available. The provided URL leads to a series by the director, but not a specific film with this title. https://www.dimitrilegrand.com/series-eng

There is no standalone "Magneto" film. The character is a central figure in the X-Men film series, portrayed by Ian McKellen and Michael Fassbender, exploring his complex relationship with Professor X and his fight for mutant rights.
A biographical drama about the final days of the legendary opera singer Maria Callas in 1970s Paris.
A CIA analyst, after a personal tragedy, goes rogue to uncover a conspiracy within the agency. It appears you may be referring to the film 'The Amateur'.
The life of Parthenope, from her birth in 1950 to the present day, is intertwined with the city of Naples.
This is not a film, but the nickname given to the serial killer protagonist, Dexter Morgan, in the TV series Dexter. He is a forensic analyst who secretly hunts and kills other murderers.
An Indian action-thriller series about a middle-class man who secretly works for a special cell of the National Investigation Agency, struggling to balance his family life with his high-stakes job.
Set in the 1960s, this drama series follows the lives of the advertisers of Madison Avenue, focusing on the mysterious but talented ad executive Don Draper.
Historical drama series set in feudal Japan, following an English sailor and a powerful daimyo.
A famous film director returns to his Sicilian hometown for the funeral of his old friend, the projectionist at the local cinema, and reminisces about his childhood and his love for movies.

Non-narrative documentary showcasing breathtaking visuals of human life, spirituality, and the natural world across the globe. Offers deep contemplation and perspective without narrative demands – pure visual immersion.
Indus Blues is a documentary that follows several Pakistani folk artists, including Sarinda player Ustad Ziauddin, as they struggle to keep their dying musical traditions alive.
Whimsical French film about finding joy in small things, connecting with others subtly, visually rich and optimistic.
Explores genius, emotional vulnerability, mentorship, therapy, and finding an authentic path beyond pure intellect.
Epic, complex anime tackling themes of nature vs. humanity, spirituality, transformation, and finding balance amidst conflict. Visually spectacular with profound depth.

column1: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
column2: After a painful breakup, a couple undergoes a medical procedure to have each other erased from their memories, but as his memories progressively disappear, the man realizes he's made a terrible mistake.
(Sluzhebnyy roman) Lyrical comedy about a shy statistician trying to woo his strict, workaholic female boss.
(Brilliantovaya ruka) Comedy where an ordinary citizen is mistaken for a smuggler and has jewels hidden in his arm cast.
(Kavkazskaya plennitsa) Comedy featuring the student Shurik, who unwittingly aids in the kidnapping of a "bride" in the Caucasus mountains.

A ruthless silver miner turned oil prospector ruthlessly claws his way to wealth during Southern California's oil boom of the late 19th and early 20th centuries, a journey marked by greed, faith, and family.

While hunting, a man stumbles upon a bloody crime scene, two million dollars, and a ruthless, psychopathic killer who will stop at nothing to recover the money, leading to a cat-and-mouse chase across West Texas.
WWI drama filmed to look like a continuous shot, following two soldiers delivering a message.
A Russian poet and his guide travel through Italy researching an 18th-century composer, but he is overcome by a profound and suffocating sense of homesickness.
An epic historical drama depicting the forbidden love between the Mughal Prince Salim and a court dancer, Anarkali, and the resulting conflict with his imperious father, Emperor Akbar.
Gentle, visually beautiful anime offering comfort, connection to nature, and finding magic in the everyday.
An epic historical drama about the forbidden love between Mughal Prince Salim and a court dancer, Anarkali, and the subsequent conflict with his father, Emperor Akbar.
A Russian writer traveling in Italy to research an 18th-century composer is overcome with a powerful sense of homesickness.
In the midst of the Cold War, a young boy discovers and befriends a giant alien robot that a paranoid government agent wants to destroy.
In 1960s Hong Kong, two neighbors, a journalist and a secretary, form a strong platonic bond after they suspect their respective spouses are having an affair with each other.
(Moskva slezam ne verit) Academy Award-winning drama following three female friends in Moscow over two decades.

Visually stunning and atmospheric exploration of creation, memory, what it means to be human, and finding purpose in a potentially bleak future. Deep questions wrapped in a beautiful, immersive world.
A visually iconic cyberpunk epic exploring power, transformation, societal breakdown, and existential questions. Intense, but with profound underlying themes resonating with Prometheus.

column1: Nausicaä of the Valley of the Wind
column2: An early Miyazaki masterpiece with stunning visuals. Explores environmental themes, conflict, leadership, spirituality, and humanity's relationship with nature; epic yet thoughtful.
Series starring Sylvester Stallone as a mafia capo exiled to Tulsa, Oklahoma.
A contemplative and gentle film following Hirayama, a man who seems utterly content with his simple life as a cleaner of public toilets in Tokyo, finding joy in music, books, and small moments.
A stunning and mysterious Russian drama in which two young brothers' lives are upended when their father, a man they only know from a photograph, suddenly reappears after a 12-year absence.

A contemplative and gentle film following Hirayama, a man who seems utterly content with his simple life as a cleaner of public toilets in Tokyo, finding joy in music, books, and the small moments of everyday life.
Intellectually stimulating yet deeply emotional sci-fi exploring communication, time, and connection; visually immersive and profound.
A Puerto Rican ex-convict, just released from prison, pledges to go straight and leave his criminal life behind, but is dragged back into the criminal world by his past connections.
A contemplative film following a toilet cleaner in Tokyo as he goes about his simple, structured life, finding beauty in the everyday.
After a car wreck on the winding Mulholland Drive renders a woman amnesiac, she and a perky Hollywood-hopeful search for clues to her identity, uncovering a world of surreal dreams and dark secrets.
A coming-of-age story in which a young boy in a working-class Italian-American neighborhood is torn between the worlds of his honest, hardworking father and a charismatic local mob boss.
A team of astronauts escape a dystopian Earth and crash-land on a new planet. Years later, their descendants have formed a primitive society, and a new arrival from Earth is hailed as a messiah.
Another comforting Ghibli anime about a young witch finding her place and skills, visually lovely and gently paced.
A creatively told story weaving through Japanese history via one actress's memories. Explores identity, purpose, memory, and the search for connection across a lifetime (4/6 resonance).
A slow-paced tale of former childhood sweethearts stuck in 1980s Taiwan, exploring the anxieties of a generation pulled between new Western consumerism and old Asian familial obligations.
In a 1920s Los Angeles hospital, a bedridden stuntman tells a fantastical story to a young immigrant girl with a broken arm, blurring the lines between fiction and reality.
A team of astronauts crash-land on an Earth-like planet and form a new society. Years later, a lone astronaut arrives and is hailed as a messiah.
(The Best Offer) Mystery about an eccentric art auctioneer whose life is overturned by a reclusive heiress.
Modernist drama about a young woman's affair with an arrogant stockbroker in Rome.
On a remote island off the coast of Ireland, a simple man is left devastated when his lifelong friend and drinking buddy abruptly decides to end their relationship, with alarming consequences.

The second film in the Koker Trilogy, where a director and his son journey to the region, devastated by an earthquake, to search for the young actors from the first film, "Where Is the Friend's Home?".
A collection of eight visually stunning and surreal vignettes, based on the actual recurring dreams of the director, Akira Kurosawa, exploring themes of life, death, art, and nature.
The Last Days of Ptolemy Grey is a limited series about a 91-year-old man with dementia who is given a temporary cure, allowing him to investigate the death of his nephew.

A substitute teacher who drifts from classroom to classroom, deliberately avoiding emotional connections, finds himself unexpectedly invested in the lives of his students and colleagues at a failing high school.
Thoughtful sci-fi about identity, destiny, overcoming perceived limitations, and the resilience of the human spirit. Understated, character-driven, with a quiet intensity.
A visually dazzling and surreal journey into dreams, reality, and the subconscious. Explores identity and perception in a highly imaginative, thought-provoking way (for the ENTP mind).
On a remote island off the coast of Ireland, a man is devastated when his lifelong friend abruptly ends their relationship, leading to escalating and alarming consequences.
After settling in America, a man from a wealthy Afghan family returns to his war-torn homeland to rescue the son of his childhood friend, confronting a dark secret from his past.
The Clock family are four-inch-tall "borrowers" who live anonymously in another family's home, but their lives are changed when their daughter, Arrietty, is discovered by a human boy.
A coolie named Pushpa rises through the ranks of a red sandalwood smuggling syndicate, making powerful enemies as his ambition and dominance grow.
A talented violin restorer and his business partner's relationship is disrupted when the partner's lover, a beautiful concert violinist, falls for the emotionally detached restorer.
A laborer rises through the ranks of a red sandalwood smuggling syndicate, making enemies along the way.
Set in a Kurdish village on the Iran-Iraq border, a group of orphaned siblings, led by the eldest boy, Ayoub, take on dangerous smuggling work to pay for their disabled brother's crucial surgery.
Explores the search for meaning, connection, and truth on a cosmic scale, balancing science and faith/wonder. Offers intellectual stimulation and a sense of awe.
From the director of Ghost in the Shell. A more subdued political thriller focusing on philosophical questions about peace, war, and societal control, with a mature, atmospheric tone.
Animated fantasy about a field mouse seeking the aid of a colony of rats to save her son.
Psychological thriller about a lonely man living in a Swiss hotel with a dark secret.
A mysterious patient named Prot, who claims to be an alien from the planet K-PAX, arrives at a psychiatric institute, causing the staff and patients to question his origins and their own realities.
After a plea bargain frees one of his family's murderers, a brilliant strategist orchestrates a series of deadly attacks from his jail cell, targeting the flawed justice system he holds responsible.
A man takes justice into his own hands after a plea bargain sets one of his family's killers free, targeting not only the killer but the entire justice system.
A professional tennis player, now a coach, signs her husband up for a challenger event where he finds himself competing against his former best friend and her ex-boyfriend.
A timeless story of human connection and self-discovery, chronicling the life of a young Black man from childhood to adulthood as he grapples with his identity, masculinity, and sexuality in Miami.
A South Korean drama about a real estate magazine editor who, despite her experience, is homeless, and her cantankerous CEO who sees property only as an investment.
In 1970s Los Angeles, a mismatched pair of a private eye and a hired enforcer team up to investigate the case of a missing girl and the seemingly unrelated death of a porn star.

Following the death of the Pope, Cardinal Lawrence is tasked with overseeing the secretive Vatican conclave to elect a successor, only to uncover a conspiracy that could shake the foundations of the Church.
A celebrity model couple are invited on a luxury cruise for the super-rich, but things go catastrophically wrong when a storm hits, leaving the survivors stranded on a deserted island.
Incredibly warm, funny, and kind films about finding family, acceptance, and doing good; pure comfort viewing.
Feel-good journey of rediscovering passion, creativity, and connection after burnout; satisfying and inspiring.

column1: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
column2: Visually stunning adventure about breaking routine, finding courage, and embracing life's potential; uplifting and escapist.
A South Korean drama about a man who buys houses and a woman who lives in one. Their lives intertwine as they navigate the world of real estate and romance.
Miniseries following the rise and fall of WeWork and the narcissism of its founders.
Drama about a retired orchestra conductor and a film director vacationing in the Alps.
A coming-of-age story set in 1980s Naples, following a young boy's joy and tragedy.
Biopic of José Hernández, a migrant farm worker who becomes a NASA astronaut.
Visually symbolic and non-linear meditation on love, death, immortality, and transformation across time. Emotionally resonant in an archetypal way.
A group of single, unemployed actors navigate the dating scene and nightlife in 1990s Los Angeles during the swing revival.
French spy comedy spoof about a writer who inserts himself into his own novels.

column1: SEMA - A Journey Into Rumi & The Whirling Dervishes of Turkey
column2: A documentary exploring the mystical Sufi ritual of Sema, the physically active meditation practiced by the Whirling Dervishes, and its connection to the poet Rumi.
A collection of stories from the final issue of a fictional American magazine based in a 20th-century French city, bringing to life the publication's most eccentric and beloved articles.

column1: The Mansion in Chess of the Wind
column2: An Iranian film, long thought lost, about the conflicts that arise within a wealthy family following the death of their matriarch, as they vie for control of the inheritance. The title is often translated as "Chess of the Wind".
Comedy where the director travels the world finding parallels to his homeland of Palestine.
The true story of the unlikely friendship between a high school football coach and a young man with an intellectual disability, nicknamed "Radio," who transforms the team and the town.
A young linguist and cartographer joins an expedition to find the lost city of Atlantis, a mythical kingdom believed to be hidden deep in the sea.
A woman's trip to her Spanish hometown for her sister's wedding turns into a nightmare when her daughter is kidnapped, revealing long-buried family secrets.

A former Special Forces operator works as a high-priced "transporter" for hire, moving goods with no questions asked. His disciplined life is thrown into chaos when he breaks his own rule and opens a package.
Action comedy about a top-secret WWII combat unit formed by Winston Churchill.
A lonely and pragmatic scholar on a trip to Istanbul encounters a Djinn who offers her three wishes in exchange for his freedom, leading to a profound conversation that spans millennia.
(Laylat Shitaa Dafi'a) Egyptian romantic drama about a wealthy woman running from an arranged marriage.
A 1953 Bollywood film in which a kind, wealthy man who helps those in need falls for a girl from a poor family, leading to various dramatic twists.

column1: The Man in the Iron Mask
column2: The cruel King Louis XIV of France has a secret twin brother whom he keeps imprisoned in an iron mask. The legendary Three Musketeers plot to replace the tyrant with his gentler twin.
A teenager's life is upended when a classmate introduces him to a mysterious late-night TV show. After its abrupt cancellation, the boundary between television and reality begins to blur.
A disillusioned young man embarks on a surreal and mysterious quest to find a woman who has vanished from his apartment complex.
A low-level CIA employee working in Paris teams up with a hot-headed, trigger-happy, and unpredictable senior agent to stop a terrorist attack in the city.
Drama about an aspiring bodybuilder who pushes his body to the limit.
Based on Mario Puzo's novel, the film follows Salvatore Giuliano, a charismatic bandit who, in post-WWII Sicily, dreams of liberating his homeland from Italian rule and making it an American state.
An ex-cop with a violent past becomes a driver for an illegal import/export business, leading him into a dangerous criminal underworld. This is the South Korean title for the film "Running Man".
(Culpa mía) Romance where a young woman falls for her wealthy new stepbrother.
A Las Vegas magician who can see into the future is pursued by FBI agents seeking to use his abilities to prevent a nuclear terrorist attack.
Sci-fi thriller about an insurance agent investigating robots violating their protocols.
Two researchers in a physics lab are framed for murder and treason after they discover a new form of clean, limitless energy, forcing them to go on the run from the FBI.
In ancient Egypt, a mortal hero, Bek, teams up with the god Horus in an alliance against Set, the merciless god of darkness, who has usurped Egypt's throne.
A historical action film based on the medieval Primary Chronicle, depicting the story of Vladimir the Great, a young prince who must conquer his treacherous half-brothers to unite his people.
Action horror where the Archangel Michael defends humanity against a legion of angels.
Live-action adaptation of the manga about alchemist brothers searching for the Philosopher's Stone.
An epic saga of power, loyalty, and crime, following the rise and fall of a mafia family in America.
A powerful historical drama recounting the real-life efforts of Oskar Schindler to save Jews during the Holocaust, blending humanity and tragedy.
A dark, action-packed superhero film where Batman battles the Joker, delving into chaos, morality, and the psychological complexity of heroism.
A non-linear, genre-defining crime film weaving together interconnected stories, full of dark humor, violence, and pop culture references.
A psychological drama where an office worker forms an underground fight club, challenging societal norms, masculinity, and self-destruction.
An epic fantasy saga following the journey of a hobbit and his companions to destroy a powerful ring and confront dark forces.
A mind-bending thriller where a team of thieves enter dreams to plant ideas, exploring layers of consciousness and memory manipulation.
A gritty, thrilling portrayal of life in the mafia, chronicling the rise and fall of a mobster in New York City.
A timeless romance set during World War II, where a nightclub owner must choose between love and duty.
A nostalgic ode to cinema, following a young boy’s friendship with a film projectionist and his lifelong love for movies.
An animated action-comedy following a dysfunctional family of superheroes on various misadventures, parodying comic book tropes.
A tense, intense drama about a young drummer’s obsession with achieving greatness, clashing with his ruthless music instructor’s demands.
A darkly comedic thriller about a poor family scheming their way into the lives of a wealthy family, unraveling the stark divide between social classes.
A mind-bending thriller told in reverse, following a man with short-term memory loss trying to find his wife’s killer.
A visually restored World War I documentary using real footage, giving a vivid and poignant portrayal of the soldiers’ experiences during the war.
A tender romance spanning decades, following two childhood friends as they reconnect and reflect on how their lives diverged across continents and cultures.
A powerful drama about the complexities of family and justice.
A touching story of a boy who loses his sister’s shoes.
A masterful blend of fiction and reality, where a man impersonates a filmmaker, blurring the line between truth and performance.
A revisionist Western where an aging gunslinger seeks redemption for his violent past, questioning morality and justice.
A satirical drama about a man who discovers his entire life is a carefully constructed reality show, raising questions about free will and media control.
A high-octane biopic of Jordan Belfort, chronicling his rise and fall in the world of stock market corruption, excess, and debauchery.
A slow-burn Turkish drama about a retired actor grappling with personal failures and societal tensions in a remote Anatolian hotel.
A philosophical comedy where a woman mistakenly sent to the "Good Place" after death tries to hide her past, delving into moral philosophy and ethics.
A heartwarming yet complex road-trip film where a Black pianist and his white driver form an unlikely friendship during a tour through the 1960s American South.
A visually stunning environmental documentary exploring the deep history of human civilization and its impact on the planet, offering an eco-conscious perspective.
A documentary-drama blending fiction and reality.
A blind boy’s relationship with his father and nature.
An intense psychological drama where identity and reality blur between an actress and her nurse.
A poetic Iranian film about a young boy searching for his friend's house to return a notebook, reflecting human kindness and persistence.
A man’s descent into madness after his beloved cow disappears.
A satire on religion and politics, following the life of a man born on the same day as Jesus, mistaken for the Messiah.
A cyberpunk anime exploring the nature of identity in a technologically advanced world, where artificial intelligence blurs the human experience.
A contemplative Iranian film that delves into the nuances of the female experience, blurring the line between fiction and reality through the perspective of women in society.
A British comedy series centered around the eccentric family dynamics and chaotic dinners shared by two brothers and their parents.

column1: The Perks of Being a Wallflower
column2: A coming-of-age story about an introverted teenager who finds friendship and love while confronting trauma and growing up.
A futuristic romance where a man falls in love with his operating system, exploring themes of artificial intelligence, loneliness, and connection.
A vibrant, bittersweet musical about two aspiring artists whose romantic relationship is tested by their divergent dreams and ambitions in Los Angeles.
A visually stunning sci-fi sequel where a blade runner uncovers a secret that could reshape the future, exploring identity, humanity, and artificial life.
An exploration of alienation and emotional disconnection amidst modern life, as characters navigate their fractured relationships.
A sci-fi tale that questions reality and identity, set in a dystopian future where a virtual world may be manipulated.
A man’s simple life is transformed after a series of events.
A short documentary about a leper colony in Iran.
A mysterious disappearance during a group holiday in northern Iran.
A mysterious journey through loss and alienation as a woman disappears during a Mediterranean island trip.
A coming-of-age crime drama set in 1960s New York, where a boy is torn between the values of his father and the allure of the mob.
A meditative film about the complexities of love and filmmaking, following a director as he tries to capture authenticity amid life’s ambiguities.
A poetic Iranian film about a filmmaker visiting a rural village for a funeral, blending existential themes with everyday life’s rhythms.
A touching romantic drama set in Mumbai, where a mistaken lunchbox delivery sparks an epistolary relationship between two strangers.
A heart-wrenching drama about a man returning to his hometown after a family tragedy, forced to confront his painful past and the limits of redemption.
An Iranian drama about a man who faces moral dilemmas after being temporarily released from prison, exploring themes of honor, deception, and society’s judgment.
A couple’s relationship unravels after a traumatic incident.
A politically charged Iranian film depicting the consequences faced by an idealistic man standing against corruption.
A contemplative Iranian film about a man driving through the countryside, seeking someone to bury him after his planned suicide, exploring existential themes.
A mind-bending sci-fi noir where a man with amnesia navigates a city controlled by mysterious beings who can manipulate reality.
An animated philosophical exploration of life, dreams, and consciousness, where a man drifts through a series of thought-provoking conversations.
A dark psychological thriller where an insomniac factory worker suffers from hallucinations, unraveling a haunting mystery tied to his mental state.
A tense thriller based on the real-life hunt for the Zodiac Killer, exploring obsession, mystery, and journalistic investigation.
A powerful drama about a disillusioned teacher navigating a broken educational system while trying to connect with students, exposing personal and societal wounds.
A visually stunning meditation on life’s beauty and emptiness, centered on an aging writer reflecting on his life in Rome’s elite circles.
A darkly comedic exploration of a washed-up actor’s mental breakdown as he attempts a Broadway comeback, blurring lines between reality and fantasy.
A tense, real-life hostage drama recounting the infamous 1988 Gladbeck hostage crisis in Germany, portraying the terror and media frenzy surrounding the event.
A contemplative drama about a father and daughter on a holiday, reflecting on their bond and the memories of childhood as the daughter grows older.
A darkly comedic and visually whimsical film where a young woman, brought back to life by a scientist, navigates a strange and chaotic world, exploring identity and autonomy.
A man drives through Tehran, searching for someone to bury him.
A charming story of a chauffeur's daughter who transforms and captures the attention of two wealthy brothers.
An Iranian neorealist film about a young boy’s journey and observations of life's hardships and human nature.
A reflective film set in post-earthquake Iran, as a man searches for two young boys, meditating on life’s fragility and resilience.
A French romantic drama about a violin maker’s unspoken love for his friend’s lover, exploring themes of emotional restraint and passion.
A dark, surreal journey through fragmented reality, as a man is caught between different dimensions and psychological distortions.
A crime drama about an arms dealer's rise and moral struggles in the global trade of illegal weapons.
A surreal, existential drama where a theater director’s life unravels as he builds a life-size replica of New York City, exploring mortality and identity.
A documentary examining the dangerous impact of social media on society, particularly its effects on mental health, democracy, and individual autonomy.
A documentary about the healing potential of psychedelics in treating addiction, anxiety, and mental health issues, blending personal stories and scientific research.
A filmmaker journeys to a remote village for a burial.
A mysterious psychological thriller where a man delves into a secret society, exploring themes of sexuality, power, and marital discord.
A bittersweet comedy-drama about a strict boarding school teacher left in charge of students during the holidays, forming unexpected connections with them.
A filmmaker documents his life under house arrest.
A contemplative French New Wave film about relationships and a young woman’s detachment as she moves between lovers.
A poignant tale of class and ambition as three boys save money to rent a suit for a special occasion, only to face life's challenges.
A tense thriller about a student drawn into a web of conspiracy and danger as he uncovers dark secrets behind his family’s past.
A young girl embarks on a quest to buy a goldfish.
A critique of the oppression of women in Iranian society.
A woman drives around Tehran, conversing with different passengers.
A gritty Iranian revenge story where a man seeks justice for the murder of his brother, set against moral and social tensions.
A documentary following filmmakers as they explore Uganda’s AIDS epidemic, highlighting the struggles and resilience of families.
An Iranian film where a female taxi driver converses with her passengers, discussing gender roles, identity, and personal freedom.
A minimalist Iranian film composed of five long takes, observing the quiet beauty and rhythms of nature and human life.
A philosophical romance where an Englishman and a Frenchwoman debate love and authenticity while traveling through Tuscany, blurring reality and fiction.
A sci-fi action film where the Avengers battle the rogue AI Ultron, delving into themes of technology, destruction, and heroism.
A visually rich meditation on aging and memory, where two old friends, a composer and a filmmaker, reflect on their lives during a stay at a luxury hotel.
A candid glimpse into the lives of Tehran’s citizens from a taxi.
A pizza delivery man is driven to despair by social inequality.
Girls in Iran attempt to attend a soccer match disguised as boys.
A sci-fi horror film where a man discovers sunglasses that reveal a hidden reality controlled by aliens, critiquing consumerism and authority.
A historical epic set during the Crusades, following a young knight who rises to defend Jerusalem, grappling with faith and leadership.
A powerful drama about a middle school teacher struggling with addiction while forming a bond with one of his students.
A poetic, dreamlike film from China, blending time and memory as a doctor searches for his missing brother, reflecting on loss and destiny.
An experimental Iranian film that focuses entirely on women watching a film, with their reactions revealing complex emotions and untold stories.
A psychological thriller where a woman’s seemingly perfect life begins to unravel as hidden truths and deceptions come to light.
A lighthearted action-comedy where a video game NPC gains self-awareness and decides to break free from his programmed life to become a hero.
A conspiracy-laden documentary examining global political and societal shifts, discussing the need for fundamental change in the world order.
A quiet, contemplative film about a young Japanese escort and her relationship with an elderly man, exploring loneliness and unexpected intimacy.

column1: Darwish: A Soldier Dreams of White Lilies
column2: A poetic film about the thoughts and dreams of a Palestinian soldier, reflecting on life, loss, and the longing for peace and beauty amidst conflict.
Two sisters experience freedom for the first time after being confined.
A photographer and his wife are stranded in a remote village.
A Disney animated adventure about a young explorer and his team on a journey to discover the legendary lost city of Atlantis.
A surreal psychological thriller where a man encounters his exact double, unraveling his perception of reality and identity.
A meditative, haunting tale about love, loss, and time, where a ghost observes the passage of time and the lives of those he left behind.
A deeply emotional biopic about Vincent van Gogh’s later years, capturing his artistic genius, mental struggles, and spiritual connection to the world around him.
A supernatural horror film set during the Iran-Iraq war.
A documentary-style look at Iranian schoolchildren and the pressures they face during their education, exposing societal expectations.
A satirical sci-fi action film set in a dystopian future where a cryogenically frozen cop must stop a crime lord, blending action and humor.
A whimsical romance where a young psychiatrist helps a patient who believes he is the legendary lover Don Juan, exploring fantasy and reality.
A spy drama about the early years of the CIA, focusing on the personal costs of espionage and moral ambiguity in the Cold War era.
A satirical drama following Italy’s media mogul Silvio Berlusconi as he navigates power, decadence, and political intrigue in the midst of a lavish lifestyle.
A unique cinematic experience where the director uses still frames to explore the relationship between art and time, offering a meditation on life’s fleeting moments.
A touching Iranian documentary exploring the first day of school for children, capturing their innocence and anxieties.
A reflective drama about an aging Western movie star grappling with his fading fame, mortality, and finding meaning in the last chapter of his life.
A crime drama based on the true story of a teenage boy who becomes an FBI informant while getting involved in Detroit’s drug trade in the 1980s.

column1: He's Just Not That Into You
column2: A romantic comedy following several interconnected characters as they navigate the confusing world of relationships and modern dating.
A high-octane James Bond film where the spy uncovers a North Korean plot involving a deadly space weapon, featuring thrilling action and gadgets.
A heartwarming romance about a young woman’s relationship with an airman, tested by life-changing events.
A light-hearted comedy where a small-town man inherits a fortune and brings his simple ways to New York City, shaking things up.

column1: What the Bleep Do We Know? (Documentary)
column2: A documentary that blends science, spirituality, and philosophy, exploring the nature of reality and human perception through quantum physics.
column4: William Arntz, Betsy Chasse, Mark Vicente

column2: A musical biopic chronicling the life and career of Hector Lavoe, the Puerto Rican salsa singer, highlighting his rise to fame and personal struggles.
A comedic adventure about a washed-up music manager who finds a talented Afghan singer and helps her rise to fame, set against a chaotic political backdrop.
